name: Ubiquiti Easy Cable, 2-pack
title: Ubiquiti Easy Cable, 2-pack
short_description: Compact Category 6A extension cable, 0.185 m length, ultra-thin 3.5 mm jacket, PoE+++ support, IPX6 waterproof cap end.
description: The Ubiquiti Easy Cable (UACC-Cable-Extender-C6A), is a compact and versatile extension cable designed for tight installation environments and precise last-inch connectivity. Built to the Category 6A standard, it ensures reliable data and power delivery and supports PoE up to PoE+++. Its ultra-thin 3.5 mm jacket makes it easy to route through narrow spaces, inside equipment enclosures, or within dense cable runs. The cable length is 0.15 m without the waterproof cap and 0.185 m with the cap, making it ideal for short-range connections where exact length and neat routing are required. The durable thermoplastic elastomer (TPE) jacket provides flexibility, and the 14 mm minimum bend radius helps prevent damage during installation. Each pack includes two cables, offering a convenient solution for multiple devices or backup use in both indoor and outdoor scenarios.

detailed_description.heading: Compact Extension Solution
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti Easy Cable (UACC-Cable-Extender-C6A), is a compact and versatile extension cable designed for tight installation environments and precise last-inch connectivity. Built to the Category 6A standard, it ensures reliable data and power delivery and supports PoE up to PoE+++. Its ultra-thin 3.5 mm jacket makes it easy to route through narrow spaces, inside equipment enclosures, or within dense cable runs. The cable length is 0.15 m without the waterproof cap and 0.185 m with the cap, making it ideal for short-range connections where exact length and neat routing are required. The durable thermoplastic elastomer (TPE) jacket provides flexibility, and the 14 mm minimum bend radius helps prevent damage during installation. Each pack includes two cables, offering a convenient solution for multiple devices or backup use in both indoor and outdoor scenarios.

detailed_description.heading: Reliability and Protection
detailed_description.text: The Easy Cable is engineered for dependable performance across indoor and outdoor installations, making it suitable for professional network setups. With an IPX6 rating at the waterproof-cap end, it withstands high-pressure water streams, ensuring safe use in outdoor environments exposed to moisture or rain. The TPE jacket is UV-resistant according to ISO4892-2, helping maintain durability in sunlight, while the VW-1 (UL1581) flame rating enhances safety in enterprise deployments. Its F/UTP shielding helps reduce electromagnetic interference and maintains signal integrity in demanding environments. Weighing only 18.5 g, the cable is lightweight yet robust, offering long-lasting resistance to frequent bending or adjustments. Designed for final-segment connectivity in dense networking areas, this extension cable delivers the required protection, flexibility, and reliability for modern PoE-powered infrastructures.
